request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on others for our defense? Those days are over. Our strategic autonomy isn't just about strength—it's about ensuring our grandchildren never face the same uncertainties we did. The recent alliance drills showed how vulnerable we still are without full self-reliance. Let's finish what we started. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
